titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 161: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 161. (A.R. No. 684 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Gaṇēśa shrine, Neḍuṅgaḷanāthasvāmi temple.

It records the apportionment of the yield of twelve kalam of paddy from the land at Kaḷarikuṟichchi due to be remitted annually for the performance of agnikāriya to the god Mahādēva of Tiruneḍuṅguḷam in Kavīra-nāḍu during the three daily services by Vēlveṭṭi Gōvindabhaṭṭaṉ who was doing the śrīkāriyam of the above temple at the behest of Sembiyan Vaḍapuṟaiyūr-nāṭṭu Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, an agent of (kanmi) of Uttamachōḻa Brahmādhirājar. The kōyil-uḍaiyār undertook to carry out the said benefaction by supplying ghee and other items required for the purpose.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. III No. 140.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu patinālāvatu kaviranāṭṭut tiruneṭuṅka
ḷattu mahādevarkku Uttamacoḻa brahmātarāja kaṉmi cempiyaṉ vaṭapuṟaiyūr
nāṭṭu muventaveḷārkkāy śrīkāryyam Ārāykiṉṟa velveṭṭik koviñjabhaṭṭaṉ Iddevar
kku nicata muṉṟu sanddhiyum Agnikāryyattukku nivantañ ceyta paricāvatu nāṅkaḷ Iṉ
nāṭṭu kaḷarikuṟicci miyvākkāṉ karaiyāl Eṅkaḷukku Āṭṭavaṭṭamaṭṭak ka(ṭ)ṭava nellu
ppaṉṉirukalamum koṇṭu potu Araippiṭi (arai) neyyum meleriyu maṟṟum A
gnikāryyattukku veṇṭuvatu koṇṭu ceyvippomānom Ittirukkoyiluṭaiyom
itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
